Package com.langfuse.client.resources.commons.types

Class Dataset.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.langfuse.client.resources.commons.types.Dataset.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Dataset._FinalStage, Dataset.CreatedAtStage, Dataset.IdStage, Dataset.MetadataStage, Dataset.NameStage, Dataset.ProjectIdStage, Dataset.UpdatedAtStage
Enclosing class:
Dataset
public static final class Dataset.Builder extends Object implements Dataset.IdStage, Dataset.NameStage, Dataset.MetadataStage, Dataset.ProjectIdStage, Dataset.CreatedAtStage, Dataset.UpdatedAtStage, Dataset._FinalStage
